iching.hex.1.image: Heaven upon heaven — the sage strengthens himself ceaselessly
iching.hex.1.judgment: Pure creative force initiates all things
iching.hex.1.name: The Creative
iching.hex.10.image: Heaven above the lake — the sage distinguishes high and low
iching.hex.10.judgment: Treading upon the tiger's tail with care and propriety brings success
iching.hex.10.name: Treading
iching.hex.11.image: Earth above heaven — the ruler channels the way of heaven for the people
iching.hex.11.judgment: Heaven and earth unite — the small departs, the great approaches
iching.hex.11.name: Peace
iching.hex.12.image: Heaven above earth — the sage withdraws into inner worth
iching.hex.12.judgment: Heaven and earth do not communicate — decline and obstruction
iching.hex.12.name: Standstill
iching.hex.13.image: Heaven with fire — the sage organizes clans and distinguishes things
iching.hex.13.judgment: True fellowship among people through shared principles
iching.hex.13.name: Fellowship
iching.hex.14.image: Fire above heaven — the sage curbs evil and promotes good
iching.hex.14.judgment: Fire in heaven — supreme success through understanding what is great
iching.hex.14.name: Great Possession
iching.hex.15.image: Mountain within earth — the sage reduces what is too much and increases what is too little
iching.hex.15.judgment: Modesty creates success — the mountain within the earth
iching.hex.15.name: Modesty
iching.hex.16.image: Thunder over earth — the ancient kings made music to honor merit
iching.hex.16.judgment: Thunder over earth — enthusiasm moves all things
iching.hex.16.name: Enthusiasm
iching.hex.17.image: Thunder within the lake — the sage rests at nightfall
iching.hex.17.judgment: Adapting to the time and following with sincerity brings success
iching.hex.17.name: Following
iching.hex.18.image: Wind at the foot of the mountain — the sage stirs up the people and nourishes virtue
iching.hex.18.judgment: What has been corrupted through neglect can be restored through effort
iching.hex.18.name: Work on the Decayed
iching.hex.19.image: Earth above the lake — the sage teaches and shelters without limit
iching.hex.19.judgment: The great approaches with willing condescension toward the small
iching.hex.19.name: Approach
iching.hex.2.image: Earth upon earth — the sage supports all beings with broad virtue
iching.hex.2.judgment: Pure receptive force nourishes all things
iching.hex.2.name: The Receptive
iching.hex.20.image: Wind over earth — the ancient kings visited the regions to teach the people
iching.hex.20.judgment: The sage gazes upon the divine meaning beneath appearances
iching.hex.20.name: Contemplation
iching.hex.21.image: Thunder and lightning — the ancient kings enforced the laws with clarity
iching.hex.21.judgment: Energetic biting through obstacles restores unity
iching.hex.21.name: Biting Through
iching.hex.22.image: Fire at the foot of the mountain — the sage brightens governance without daring to judge
iching.hex.22.judgment: Beauty adorns form but substance must remain within
iching.hex.22.name: Grace
iching.hex.23.image: Mountain resting on the earth — the ruler strengthens the foundation of the people
iching.hex.23.judgment: The dark forces peel away what has been built — accept and wait
iching.hex.23.name: Splitting Apart
iching.hex.24.image: Thunder within the earth — the ancient kings closed the passes at solstice
iching.hex.24.judgment: After decay, the turning point — the one light returns below
iching.hex.24.name: Return
iching.hex.25.image: Thunder under heaven — the ancient kings nourished all beings in accord with the season
iching.hex.25.judgment: Acting from genuine nature without ulterior motive brings success
iching.hex.25.name: Innocence
iching.hex.26.image: Heaven within the mountain — the sage studies the ancients to cultivate character
iching.hex.26.judgment: Firm restraint of great creative power builds reserves of strength
iching.hex.26.name: Great Taming
iching.hex.27.image: Thunder at the foot of the mountain — the sage is careful with words and temperate in eating
iching.hex.27.judgment: Attending to what nourishes body and mind brings good fortune
iching.hex.27.name: Nourishment
iching.hex.28.image: The lake rises above the trees — the sage stands alone without fear
iching.hex.28.judgment: The ridgepole bends — extraordinary measures are needed in extraordinary times
iching.hex.28.name: Great Excess
iching.hex.29.image: Water flows on and reaches the goal — the sage teaches through repeated practice
iching.hex.29.judgment: Repeated danger teaches sincerity of heart — flow like water
iching.hex.29.name: The Abysmal
iching.hex.3.image: Thunder and rain — the sage brings order from chaos
iching.hex.3.judgment: Birth pangs of new endeavors require perseverance
iching.hex.3.name: Difficulty at the Beginning
iching.hex.30.image: Fire doubled produces great brightness — the sage illuminates all regions
iching.hex.30.judgment: Luminous clarity depends on something to cling to — accept dependence
iching.hex.30.name: The Clinging
iching.hex.31.image: The lake upon the mountain — the sage receives others with openness
iching.hex.31.judgment: Mutual attraction between the yielding and the firm brings union
iching.hex.31.name: Influence
iching.hex.32.image: Thunder and wind reinforce each other — the sage stands firm in his direction
iching.hex.32.judgment: Enduring consistency in one's way of life brings success
iching.hex.32.name: Duration
iching.hex.33.image: Mountain under heaven — the sage keeps the inferior at a distance with dignity
iching.hex.33.judgment: Strategic withdrawal before the advancing dark preserves strength
iching.hex.33.name: Retreat
iching.hex.34.image: Thunder above heaven — the sage treads no path contrary to propriety
iching.hex.34.judgment: Great power combined with righteousness moves heaven and earth
iching.hex.34.name: Great Power
iching.hex.35.image: The sun rises over the earth — the sage brightens his bright virtue
iching.hex.35.judgment: The bright sun rises over the earth — willing service brings rapid advance
iching.hex.35.name: Progress
iching.hex.36.image: The sun sinks into the earth — the sage veils his brightness in dealings with the multitude
iching.hex.36.judgment: In times of darkness the sage conceals his light to endure adversity
iching.hex.36.name: Darkening of the Light
iching.hex.37.image: Wind comes from fire — the sage speaks with substance and acts with consistency
iching.hex.37.judgment: The well-ordered family is the foundation of all social order
iching.hex.37.name: The Family
iching.hex.38.image: Fire above the lake — the sage remains individual within community
iching.hex.38.judgment: Despite outward opposition, underlying affinity makes small things possible
iching.hex.38.name: Opposition
iching.hex.39.image: Water on the mountain — the sage turns attention to self-improvement
iching.hex.39.judgment: Facing an abyss before and a mountain behind — turn inward and gather allies
iching.hex.39.name: Obstruction
iching.hex.4.image: Spring at the foot of the mountain — the sage cultivates character
iching.hex.4.judgment: The young fool seeks the teacher, not the teacher the fool
iching.hex.4.name: Youthful Folly
iching.hex.40.image: Thunder and rain arise — the sage pardons errors and forgives transgressions
iching.hex.40.judgment: When release from tension comes, return to normalcy swiftly
iching.hex.40.name: Deliverance
iching.hex.41.image: The lake at the foot of the mountain — the sage controls anger and restrains instincts
iching.hex.41.judgment: Decrease of the lower enriches the higher — sincerity in simplicity brings blessings
iching.hex.41.name: Decrease
iching.hex.42.image: Wind and thunder strengthen each other — the sage moves toward good and corrects faults
iching.hex.42.judgment: The ruler decreases self to increase the people — generous sacrifice brings benefit
iching.hex.42.name: Increase
iching.hex.43.image: The lake rises to heaven — the sage distributes blessings to those below
iching.hex.43.judgment: Resolute action brings dark matters to light — proclaim the danger openly
iching.hex.43.name: Breakthrough
iching.hex.44.image: Wind under heaven — the ruler proclaims his commands to the four quarters
iching.hex.44.judgment: The dark principle advances from below — recognize and contain it early
iching.hex.44.name: Coming to Meet
iching.hex.45.image: The lake over the earth — the sage renews his weapons to meet the unforeseen
iching.hex.45.judgment: People gather around a strong leader — prepare for the unexpected
iching.hex.45.name: Gathering Together
iching.hex.46.image: Within the earth wood grows — the sage builds great things from small beginnings
iching.hex.46.judgment: Gentle effort directed steadily upward meets with supreme success
iching.hex.46.name: Pushing Upward
iching.hex.47.image: The lake has no water — the sage risks his life to fulfill his purpose
iching.hex.47.judgment: Exhaustion of resources tests character — the sage stakes his life on following his will
iching.hex.47.name: Oppression
iching.hex.48.image: Water over wood — the sage encourages the people and counsels mutual aid
iching.hex.48.judgment: The well nourishes all without being exhausted — seek the unchanging source
iching.hex.48.name: The Well
iching.hex.49.image: Fire in the lake — the sage orders the calendar and clarifies the seasons
iching.hex.49.judgment: When the time is ripe, revolutionary change commands belief
iching.hex.49.name: Revolution
iching.hex.5.image: Clouds rise to heaven — the sage eats, drinks, and is joyful
iching.hex.5.judgment: Sincerity and patience lead to crossing the great water
iching.hex.5.name: Waiting
iching.hex.50.image: Fire over wood — the sage consolidates destiny by making his position correct
iching.hex.50.judgment: The sacred vessel transforms raw material into nourishment for the wise
iching.hex.50.name: The Cauldron
iching.hex.51.image: Repeated thunder — the sage sets things in order through fearful reflection
iching.hex.51.judgment: Shock and thunder bring fear, then laughter — the sage examines himself through awe
iching.hex.51.name: The Arousing
iching.hex.52.image: Mountains joined together — the sage does not permit thoughts to go beyond the situation
iching.hex.52.judgment: Stillness of the mountain — the sage quiets the mind and does not go beyond his position
iching.hex.52.name: Keeping Still
iching.hex.53.image: A tree on the mountain grows slowly — the sage abides in dignity and virtue
iching.hex.53.judgment: Gradual development like a tree on the mountain brings lasting results
iching.hex.53.name: Gradual Progress
iching.hex.54.image: Thunder over the lake — the sage understands the transitory in light of eternity
iching.hex.54.judgment: The younger sister follows the elder — knowing one's place brings eventual good
iching.hex.54.name: The Marrying Maiden
iching.hex.55.image: Thunder and lightning together — the sage decides lawsuits and carries out punishments
iching.hex.55.judgment: Fullness and abundance at the zenith — act now for the sun must set
iching.hex.55.name: Abundance
iching.hex.56.image: Fire on the mountain — the sage is clear and cautious in applying penalties
iching.hex.56.judgment: The traveler succeeds through smallness and adaptability, not grandeur
iching.hex.56.name: The Wanderer
iching.hex.57.image: Winds following one another — the sage spreads his commands and carries out his affairs
iching.hex.57.judgment: Persistent gentle penetration achieves what aggression cannot
iching.hex.57.name: The Gentle
iching.hex.58.image: Lakes joined together — the sage joins with friends for discussion and practice
iching.hex.58.judgment: True joy comes from inner firmness expressed with outward gentleness
iching.hex.58.name: The Joyous
iching.hex.59.image: Wind drives over the water — the ancient kings made offerings and built temples
iching.hex.59.judgment: Wind over water disperses rigid separations — use gentle means to dissolve barriers
iching.hex.59.name: Dispersion
iching.hex.6.image: Heaven and water move apart — the sage plans before acting
iching.hex.6.judgment: Inner truth and caution resolve disagreement
iching.hex.6.name: Conflict
iching.hex.60.image: Water over the lake — the sage creates number and measure to examine virtue and conduct
iching.hex.60.judgment: Proper limits bring structure — but bitter limitations should not be held to
iching.hex.60.name: Limitation
iching.hex.61.image: Wind over the lake — the sage deliberates upon punishments and delays execution
iching.hex.61.judgment: Inner truth reaches even pigs and fish — sincerity moves all beings
iching.hex.61.name: Inner Truth
iching.hex.62.image: Thunder on the mountain — the sage is reverent in conduct and sorrowful in mourning
iching.hex.62.judgment: In small matters excess is permissible — the flying bird leaves its song behind
iching.hex.62.name: Small Excess
iching.hex.63.image: Water over fire — the sage reflects on misfortune and prepares against it
iching.hex.63.judgment: All lines in their proper place — success, but vigilance against disorder
iching.hex.63.name: After Completion
iching.hex.64.image: Fire over water — the sage carefully distinguishes things and puts them in their places
iching.hex.64.judgment: The final crossing is not yet accomplished — careful discernment of forces is needed
iching.hex.64.name: Before Completion
iching.hex.7.image: Water within the earth — the sage nurtures the people and gathers strength
iching.hex.7.judgment: Discipline and just leadership organize the people
iching.hex.7.name: The Army
iching.hex.8.image: Water upon the earth — the ancient kings established their states
iching.hex.8.judgment: Union requires a central figure of sincerity
iching.hex.8.name: Holding Together
iching.hex.9.image: Wind over heaven — the sage refines outward form and virtue
iching.hex.9.judgment: Gentle restraint achieves what force cannot
iching.hex.9.name: Small Taming
iching.tpl.detail: %1$s: %2$s. Образ: %3$s. Ключевые слова: %4$s. Верхняя триграмма: %5$s, Нижняя: %6$s.
islamic.month.1.brief: Sacred month of mourning and remembrance
islamic.month.1.name: Muharram
islamic.month.10.brief: Month of celebration and voluntary fasting
islamic.month.10.event: Eid al-Fitr (1st) -- Festival of Breaking Fast
islamic.month.10.name: Shawwal
islamic.month.11.brief: Sacred month of truce and preparation for Hajj
islamic.month.11.name: Dhul Qa'dah
islamic.month.12.brief: Sacred month of pilgrimage and sacrifice
islamic.month.12.event: Hajj (8th-12th), Eid al-Adha (10th) -- Festival of Sacrifice
islamic.month.12.name: Dhul Hijjah
islamic.month.2.brief: Month of travel -- traditionally considered difficult
islamic.month.2.name: Safar
islamic.month.3.brief: Month of joy and prophetic celebration
islamic.month.3.name: Rabi al-Awwal
islamic.month.4.brief: Quiet month of reflection and growth
islamic.month.4.name: Rabi al-Thani
islamic.month.5.name: Jumada al-Ula
islamic.month.6.name: Jumada al-Thani
islamic.month.7.name: Rajab
islamic.month.8.name: Sha'ban
islamic.month.9.brief: Month of fasting, revelation, and spiritual renewal
islamic.month.9.name: Ramadan
islamic.prayer.0.meaning: Awakening -- beginning before the world stirs
islamic.prayer.0.name: Fajr
islamic.prayer.1.meaning: Remembrance -- pausing at the day's peak
islamic.prayer.1.name: Dhuhr
islamic.prayer.2.name: Asr
islamic.prayer.3.name: Maghrib
islamic.prayer.4.name: Isha
islamic.tpl.detail_sacred: Это один из четырёх священных месяцев.
japanese.era.0.brief: The era of enlightened rule — Japan emerged from isolation into the modern age
japanese.era.0.name: Meiji
japanese.era.0.spirit: Rapid modernization, opening to the world, imperial restoration
japanese.era.1.brief: The era of great righteousness — a short season of democracy and artistic freedom
japanese.era.1.name: Taisho
japanese.era.1.spirit: Democratic movement, cultural liberalism, the brief flowering
japanese.era.2.brief: The era of radiant peace — from devastation to the world's second economy
japanese.era.2.name: Showa
japanese.era.2.spirit: War, defeat, rebirth, economic miracle, longest reign
japanese.era.3.brief: The era of achieving peace — prosperity tempered by earthquakes and introspection
japanese.era.3.name: Heisei
japanese.era.3.spirit: The lost decades, natural disasters, quiet resilience
japanese.era.4.brief: The era of beautiful harmony — named from the oldest Japanese poetry anthology
japanese.era.4.name: Reiwa
japanese.era.4.spirit: New era, connection to Man'yoshu poetry, hope and harmony
japanese.rokuyo.0.brief: Win first — seize the morning, the early hours favor bold action
japanese.rokuyo.0.guidance: Morning is auspicious, afternoon unlucky — act early, avoid delay
japanese.rokuyo.0.name: Sensho
japanese.rokuyo.1.brief: Draw friend — what happens to you today may happen to those close to you
japanese.rokuyo.1.guidance: Midday is unlucky, morning and evening good — avoid funerals (the dead draw friends)
japanese.rokuyo.1.name: Tomobiki
japanese.rokuyo.2.brief: Lose first — the day begins poorly but reverses; persistence wins
japanese.rokuyo.2.guidance: Morning is unlucky, afternoon improves — patience is rewarded, wait for the turn
japanese.rokuyo.2.name: Senbu
japanese.rokuyo.3.brief: Buddha's death — the most unlucky day, yet some see humility as auspicious for weddings
japanese.rokuyo.3.guidance: The most inauspicious day — avoid celebrations, weddings, new ventures
japanese.rokuyo.3.name: Butsumetsu
japanese.rokuyo.4.brief: Great peace — the luckiest day, when everything begun has the best chance of flourishing
japanese.rokuyo.4.guidance: The most auspicious day — ideal for weddings, openings, and all beginnings
japanese.rokuyo.4.name: Taian
japanese.rokuyo.5.brief: Red mouth — words can wound today; only the noon hour offers safe passage
japanese.rokuyo.5.guidance: Midday is briefly auspicious, rest of day unlucky — guard your words, avoid arguments
japanese.rokuyo.5.name: Shakko
japanese.sekki.0.brief: The spring division — light and dark in perfect balance, life stirs
japanese.sekki.0.name: Shunbun
japanese.sekki.0.nature: Day and night equal, cherry preparations begin
japanese.sekki.1.brief: Pure brightness — the world washed clean, hanami season
japanese.sekki.1.name: Seimei
japanese.sekki.1.nature: Skies clear, cherry blossoms peak, ancestral tombs swept
japanese.sekki.10.brief: Heat departs — the furnace door closes, the air remembers coolness
japanese.sekki.10.name: Shosho
japanese.sekki.10.nature: Heat breaks, typhoon season, cotton flowers bloom
japanese.sekki.11.brief: White dew — moisture condenses on cool mornings, the world turns
japanese.sekki.11.name: Hakuro
japanese.sekki.11.nature: Morning dew on grass, geese begin to arrive, autumn deepens
japanese.sekki.12.brief: The autumn division — balance returns, the other shore is near
japanese.sekki.12.name: Shubun
japanese.sekki.12.nature: Day and night equal again, higan (equinox festival), ancestors honored
japanese.sekki.13.brief: Cold dew — the dew bites, chrysanthemums open
japanese.sekki.13.name: Kanro
japanese.sekki.13.nature: Dew chills, chrysanthemums bloom, geese have arrived
japanese.sekki.14.brief: Frost falls — the first ice crystals, the last red leaves
japanese.sekki.14.name: Soko
japanese.sekki.14.nature: First frost, maple leaves turn, harvest ends
japanese.sekki.15.brief: Winter stands — the season of rest announces itself quietly
japanese.sekki.15.name: Ritto
japanese.sekki.15.nature: First signs of winter, camellias bloom, tea season begins
japanese.sekki.16.brief: Small snow — the first flakes, not yet settling
japanese.sekki.16.name: Shosetsu
japanese.sekki.16.nature: Light snow on high ground, citrus ripens, rainbows fade
japanese.sekki.17.brief: Great snow — the world goes white and quiet
japanese.sekki.17.name: Taisetsu
japanese.sekki.17.nature: Heavy snow, bears hibernate, salmon run upstream
japanese.sekki.18.brief: Winter arrives — the longest night, yuzu in the bath, light returns tomorrow
japanese.sekki.18.name: Toji
japanese.sekki.18.nature: Shortest day, yuzu baths, kabocha pumpkin eaten for health
japanese.sekki.19.brief: Small cold — the cold deepens as the new year begins
japanese.sekki.19.name: Shokan
japanese.sekki.19.nature: Deep cold, New Year preparations, nanakusa (seven herbs) approaching
japanese.sekki.2.brief: Grain rain — the rain that feeds the rice seedlings
japanese.sekki.2.name: Kokuu
japanese.sekki.2.nature: Spring rain nourishes planted fields, last frost passes
japanese.sekki.20.brief: Great cold — the deepest freeze, when miso is prepared and patience rewarded
japanese.sekki.20.name: Daikan
japanese.sekki.20.nature: Coldest period, miso making, the patience of deep winter
japanese.sekki.21.brief: Spring stands — the plum dares to bloom in the cold, the warbler calls
japanese.sekki.21.name: Risshun
japanese.sekki.21.nature: First spring, plum blossoms, uguisu (warbler) sings
japanese.sekki.22.brief: Rain water — the frozen world begins to flow again
japanese.sekki.22.name: Usui
japanese.sekki.22.nature: Snow turns to rain, ice melts, mist over the fields
japanese.sekki.23.brief: Insects awaken — the first thunder, the earth opens, everything stirs
japanese.sekki.23.name: Keichitsu
japanese.sekki.23.nature: Thunder wakes hibernating creatures, peach trees blossom
japanese.sekki.3.brief: Summer stands — the season of growth declares itself
japanese.sekki.3.name: Rikka
japanese.sekki.3.nature: Green deepens, frogs begin singing, warmth settles in
japanese.sekki.4.brief: Small fullness — the grain swells but is not yet ripe
japanese.sekki.4.name: Shoman
japanese.sekki.4.nature: Grain heads begin to fill, barley ripens
japanese.sekki.5.brief: Bearded grain — the ears of grain appear, planting must be done
japanese.sekki.5.name: Boshu
japanese.sekki.5.nature: Rice planting season, praying mantises hatch
japanese.sekki.6.brief: Summer arrives — the longest day, but the monsoon brings its own darkness
japanese.sekki.6.name: Geshi
japanese.sekki.6.nature: Longest day, peak sunlight, rainy season (tsuyu) begins
japanese.sekki.7.brief: Small heat — the warmth intensifies, lotus ponds bloom
japanese.sekki.7.name: Shousho
japanese.sekki.7.nature: Heat builds, hot winds blow, first lotus flowers open
japanese.sekki.8.brief: Great heat — the peak of summer's furnace
japanese.sekki.8.name: Taisho
japanese.sekki.9.brief: Autumn stands — invisible at first, but the light begins to shift
japanese.sekki.9.name: Risshu
japanese.sekki.9.nature: First cool breezes, higurashi cicadas sing at dusk
kabbalah.path.0.journey: Stepping into the void with perfect trust
kabbalah.path.0.lesson: Faith requires no ground to stand on
kabbalah.path.1.journey: Channeling divine will into conscious creation
kabbalah.path.1.lesson: The creator creates by becoming transparent to creation
kabbalah.path.10.lesson: Fortune changes but passion outlasts every turning
kabbalah.path.11.lesson: Balance is not compromise — it is precision of the heart
kabbalah.path.12.lesson: The deepest discipline is to stop struggling
kabbalah.path.13.lesson: Something must die for desire to become authentic
kabbalah.path.14.lesson: Harmony manifests only when it touches the ground
kabbalah.path.15.lesson: Beauty must include darkness or it becomes a lie
kabbalah.path.16.lesson: When desire and truth collide, every false structure falls
kabbalah.path.17.lesson: The unconscious speaks in the language of what you love
kabbalah.path.18.lesson: Joy is passion that has found a body
kabbalah.path.19.lesson: The mind’s final gift: calling the soul to rise
kabbalah.path.2.journey: The long descent from crown to heart
kabbalah.path.2.lesson: Wisdom crosses the abyss only through silence
kabbalah.path.20.lesson: The scholar’s path ends where the hands begin
kabbalah.path.21.lesson: The last step: making the invisible visible
kabbalah.path.3.journey: Wisdom meeting understanding — father and mother unite
kabbalah.path.3.lesson: Creation begins where two principles embrace
kabbalah.path.4.lesson: Vision must find a heart or it remains blinding light
kabbalah.path.5.lesson: True teaching is an act of unconditional giving
kabbalah.path.6.lesson: The first choice: love or fear — always love
kabbalah.path.7.lesson: Structure without compassion becomes a prison; with it, a chariot
kabbalah.path.8.lesson: True strength is mercy that knows when to say no
kabbalah.path.9.lesson: The lamp of mercy illuminates the path inward
kabbalah.sefirah.0.brief: The unknowable origin — divine will before manifestation
kabbalah.sefirah.0.meditation: Crown — the point before thought, pure will
kabbalah.sefirah.0.name: Keter
kabbalah.sefirah.0.question: What exists before I think?
kabbalah.sefirah.1.brief: Primal wisdom — the lightning flash that begins all things
kabbalah.sefirah.1.meditation: Wisdom — the flash of insight, the father principle
kabbalah.sefirah.1.name: Chokmah
kabbalah.sefirah.1.question: What is the first spark of creation?
kabbalah.sefirah.2.brief: The great mother — understanding that shapes raw wisdom into form
kabbalah.sefirah.2.meditation: Understanding — the womb that gives form to wisdom
kabbalah.sefirah.2.name: Binah
kabbalah.sefirah.2.question: How does the infinite become finite?
kabbalah.sefirah.3.brief: Unconditional love — the outpouring of grace
kabbalah.sefirah.3.meditation: Mercy — boundless giving, expansion without limit
kabbalah.sefirah.3.name: Chesed
kabbalah.sefirah.3.question: Where must I give without condition?
kabbalah.sefirah.4.brief: Sacred restriction — strength that shapes through limitation
kabbalah.sefirah.4.name: Gevurah
kabbalah.sefirah.4.question: Where must I set boundaries?
kabbalah.sefirah.5.brief: The heart center — beauty born from the marriage of giving and restraint
kabbalah.sefirah.5.meditation: Beauty — the heart that balances mercy and judgment
kabbalah.sefirah.5.name: Tiferet
kabbalah.sefirah.5.question: How do I harmonize opposites?
kabbalah.sefirah.6.brief: The fire of eternity — passion that endures beyond reason
kabbalah.sefirah.6.name: Netzach
kabbalah.sefirah.6.question: What drives me to persist?
kabbalah.sefirah.7.brief: The glory of surrender — mind bowing to what is greater
kabbalah.sefirah.7.name: Hod
kabbalah.sefirah.7.question: How do I serve the truth?
kabbalah.sefirah.8.brief: The foundation — where all upper forces gather before manifesting
kabbalah.sefirah.8.meditation: Foundation — the gateway between above and below
kabbalah.sefirah.8.name: Yesod
kabbalah.sefirah.8.question: What connects my inner world to outer reality?
kabbalah.sefirah.9.brief: The kingdom of the present moment — divinity in matter
kabbalah.sefirah.9.meditation: Kingdom — the physical world, embodiment, presence
kabbalah.sefirah.9.name: Malkuth
kabbalah.sefirah.9.question: Am I fully here?
korean.element.0.brief: Wood — the green force that pushes upward through all obstacles
korean.element.0.meaning: Growth, expansion, benevolence, the force that rises
korean.element.1.brief: Fire — the radiance that illuminates and transforms
korean.element.1.meaning: Transformation, passion, propriety, the force that spreads
korean.element.2.brief: Earth — the center that nourishes and grounds all things
korean.element.2.meaning: Stability, centering, trust, the force that holds
korean.element.3.brief: Metal — the sharp edge that refines and lets go
korean.element.3.meaning: Precision, righteousness, clarity, the force that contracts
korean.element.4.brief: Water — the deep stillness that finds its way through everything
korean.element.4.meaning: Wisdom, depth, adaptability, the force that descends
korean.festival.0.brief: Lunar New Year — the most important holiday, when the whole nation returns home
korean.festival.0.name: Seollal
korean.festival.0.practice: Charye (ancestral rites), sebae (bowing to elders for blessings), tteokguk (rice cake soup for gaining a year)
korean.festival.0.theme: New beginnings — honoring ancestors, renewing family bonds
korean.festival.1.brief: Great Full Moon — the first full moon of the year burns away bad luck
korean.festival.1.name: Daeboreum
korean.festival.1.practice: Cracking nuts (bureom), eating five-grain rice (ogokbap), moon-viewing, fire festivals (daljip burning)
korean.festival.1.theme: Fullness — the first full moon, wishing for a bountiful year
korean.festival.2.brief: Double Third — the swallows return from the south and spring declares itself
korean.festival.2.name: Samjinnal
korean.festival.2.practice: Flower pancakes (hwajeon), spring outings, welcoming the swallows
korean.festival.2.theme: Spring arrival — swallows return, nature awakens
korean.festival.3.brief: Double Fifth — when heaven's yang energy is strongest and the earth celebrates with wrestling
korean.festival.3.name: Dano
korean.festival.3.practice: Ssireum (wrestling), swing riding, washing hair in iris water, surichwitteok (herb rice cakes)
korean.festival.3.theme: Peak yang energy — the most yang day of the year (5th day, 5th month)
korean.festival.4.brief: Star Festival — the celestial lovers' once-a-year meeting across the bridge of magpies
korean.festival.4.name: Chilseok
korean.festival.4.practice: Wishing upon stars, wheat flour noodles (milguksu), bathing in star-blessed rain
korean.festival.4.theme: Love and reunion — the Weaver and Cowherd cross the Milky Way
korean.festival.5.brief: Harvest Moon — Korea's Thanksgiving, when the full autumn moon shines on shared abundance
korean.festival.5.name: Chuseok
korean.festival.5.practice: Songpyeon (half-moon rice cakes), charye (ancestral rites), visiting graves (seongmyo), folk games
korean.festival.5.theme: Gratitude — harvest thanksgiving, abundance shared with ancestors
korean.festival.6.brief: Double Ninth — ascending to high ground to see far, drinking the flower of longevity
korean.festival.6.name: Jungyangjeol
korean.festival.6.practice: Climbing mountains, chrysanthemum wine (gukhwaju), chrysanthemum pancakes, poetry
lao.festival.1.brief: Pi Mai — three days when Laos washes away the old year: Sangkhan Luang (farewell), Sangkhan Nao (the day between), Sangkhan Khuen (new dawn)
lao.festival.1.name: Pi Mai Lao
lao.festival.1.practice: Pouring water over Buddha images and elders, baci string-tying ceremony, sand stupas at temples, Nang Sangkhan maiden procession in Luang Prabang
lao.festival.1.theme: Water, renewal, baci — the Lao New Year cleansing
lao.festival.2.brief: National Day — honoring the establishment of the Lao PDR and the long path to sovereignty
lao.festival.2.name: National Day
lao.festival.2.practice: National ceremonies, public holiday, reflection on independence (December 2, 1975)
lao.festival.2.theme: Sovereignty, memory — founding of the Lao People's Democratic Republic
lao.festival.3.brief: Liberation Day — the moment Laos declared its independence from colonial administration
lao.festival.3.name: Liberation Day
lao.festival.3.practice: Ceremonies and remembrance of Lao Issara independence declaration (October 12, 1945)
lao.festival.3.theme: Freedom, history — liberation from French colonial rule
lao.month.1.brief: January — named from Capricorn, the cool season wraps the river valleys
lao.month.1.season: Cool season peak — the sea-goat month, Mekong mists, quiet temples
lao.month.10.brief: October — named from Libra, Lai Heua Fai fire boats float down the Mekong
lao.month.10.season: Rainy season ending — the scales month, Ok Phansa (Lent ends), boat racing
lao.month.11.brief: November — named from Scorpio, the nation gathers at That Luang in Vientiane
lao.month.11.season: Cool season begins — the scorpion month, Boun That Luang at the great stupa
lao.month.12.brief: December — named from Sagittarius, Laos celebrates its founding and the cool returns
lao.month.12.season: Cool season — the archer month, National Day (December 2), year closing
lao.month.2.brief: February — named from Aquarius, monks chant the tale of the Buddha's last birth
lao.month.2.season: Cool season fading — the water-bearer month, Boun Pha Vet (Vessantara Jataka)
lao.month.3.brief: March — named from Pisces, the land waits between harvests
lao.month.3.season: Hot season begins — the fish month, dry heat over rice paddies
lao.month.4.brief: April — named from Aries, Nang Sangkhan descends as Laos washes away the old year
lao.month.4.season: Hot season peak — the ram month, Pi Mai Lao water festival
lao.month.5.brief: May — named from Taurus, villages launch rockets to summon the monsoon
lao.month.5.season: Hot season end — the bull month, Boun Bang Fai rockets call the rain
lao.month.6.brief: June — named from Gemini, the Buddha's birth, awakening, and parinibbana honored
lao.month.6.season: Rainy season begins — the twins month, Visakha Boucha (triple anniversary)
lao.month.7.brief: July — named from Cancer, monks enter the three-month rains retreat
lao.month.7.season: Rainy season — the crab month, Khao Phansa (Buddhist Lent begins)
lao.month.8.brief: August — named from Leo, the monsoon feeds the river and the paddies
lao.month.8.season: Rainy season peak — the lion month, rice transplanting, Mekong rises
lao.month.9.brief: September — named from Virgo, offerings placed at temples for the departed
lao.month.9.season: Late rainy season — the maiden month, Khao Phadap Din (honoring ancestors)
myanmar.month.0.brief: First month — the great water festival washes away the old year
myanmar.month.0.festival: Thingyan water festival, Myanmar New Year celebrations
myanmar.month.0.name: Tagu
myanmar.month.1.brief: Month of the Bodhi tree — water poured on sacred trees on the full moon
myanmar.month.1.festival: Watering the Bodhi tree (Kason full moon, Buddha's enlightenment)
myanmar.month.1.name: Kason
myanmar.month.10.brief: Month of sticky rice — communities gather to cook htamane together in great pots
myanmar.month.10.name: Tabodwe
myanmar.month.11.brief: Month of pagodas — sand stupas built on riverbanks, the great Shwedagon festival
myanmar.month.11.festival: Sand pagoda building, Shwedagon pagoda festival
myanmar.month.11.name: Tabaung
myanmar.month.2.brief: Month of study — the rains begin and monks deepen their learning
myanmar.month.2.name: Nayon
myanmar.month.3.brief: Month of Lent — Vassa begins, monks retreat for three months of rain
myanmar.month.3.festival: Waso full moon: beginning of Vassa (Lent), robe offering to monks
myanmar.month.3.name: Waso
myanmar.month.4.brief: Month of lots — communities draw lots to offer robes during the rains
myanmar.month.4.festival: Drawing lots for robes, spirit propitiation, nat festivals
myanmar.month.4.name: Wagaung
myanmar.month.5.brief: Month of boat races — the rivers are full and boats race on the floodwaters
myanmar.month.5.festival: Boat racing festivals on rivers and lakes
myanmar.month.5.name: Tawthalin
myanmar.month.6.brief: Month of lights — the Buddha descends from heaven, the world lights up to welcome Him
myanmar.month.6.festival: Festival of Lights (Thadingyut full moon), end of Vassa, lighting festivals
myanmar.month.6.name: Thadingyut
myanmar.month.7.brief: Month of weaving — all-night robe-weaving contests in the light of the full moon
myanmar.month.7.festival: Tazaungdaing festival of lights, robe-weaving competitions
myanmar.month.7.name: Tazaungmon
myanmar.month.8.brief: Month of nat spirits — the spirits are honored with music and offerings
myanmar.month.8.festival: Nat spirit festivals, traditional music and dance
myanmar.month.8.name: Nadaw
myanmar.month.9.brief: Month of harvest — the rice is gathered and the villages celebrate with games
myanmar.month.9.festival: Harvest festival, village feasts, equestrian events
myanmar.month.9.name: Pyatho
narr.tmpl.astronomical.3: %H. Математика точна, но красота — за пределами вычислений.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.4: Измерено до секунды, предсказано на века — и всё же %H.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.0: Небо смещается — %H. Каждое небесное событие когда-то было посланием богов, затем — математическим предсказанием. Небу безразлично, что мы о нём думаем. Оно движется.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.1: %H. Космос перестраивается. Необычайно не само событие — а то, что мы можем предсказать его на века вперёд и всё ещё быть потрясены, когда оно наступит.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.2: В вышине — %A небесное событие. %H. Тысячелетиями люди смотрели вверх и видели смысл. Теперь мы видим физику. Быть может, это одно и то же с разных высот.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.3: %H. Математика точна, но красота — за пределами вычислений. Мы можем предсказать до секунды, когда это произойдёт. Мы не можем предсказать, что вы почувствуете.
narr.tmpl.astronomical.deep.4: Измерено до секунды, предсказано на века — и всё же %H. Зазор между знанием и переживанием — именно в нём живёт удивление.
narr.tmpl.convergence.3: Слышите? %S шепчут одну и ту же истину — %H.
narr.tmpl.convergence.4: То, что вы ищете сегодня, сегодня ищет вас. %H — %A резонанс.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.0: %A схождение разворачивается — %H. %S говорят как одно. Когда отдельные традиции приходят к одному порогу, незримая нить между ними становится видимой.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.1: Сегодня %S совпадают в %A моменте. %H. Эти системы родились веками врозь, в разных землях, под разными звёздами — и всё же сегодня указывают на одну истину.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.2: %H — %A совпадение через %S. Схождение не случайно. Каждая традиция измеряла то, что могла видеть, и сегодня они видят одно и то же под разными углами.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.3: Слышите? %S шепчут одну и ту же истину — %H. Отдельные голоса, отдельные ритмы, отдельные истории — и всё же моменты, когда они поют в унисон.
narr.tmpl.convergence.deep.4: То, что вы ищете сегодня, сегодня ищет вас. %H — %A резонанс через %S. Математика говорит, что эти системы независимы. Опыт говорит иное.
narr.tmpl.cycle.3: Колесо вращалось прежде. Оно будет вращаться снова. %H.
narr.tmpl.cycle.4: %H. То, что кончается, есть и то, что начинается — цикл не знает разницы.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.0: Цикл поворачивается — %H. Это не повторение, а возвращение. Колесо, приносящее лето, приносит и зиму. Ничто не утрачено — лишь преображено.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.1: %H. Старое начинается заново. Гениальность циклического времени в том, что ничто не вечно — даже окончания. Каждая цивилизация, следившая за небом, открыла это.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.2: Колесо завершает оборот. %H. Для тех, кто чувствует ритм, это возвращение домой — знакомое, возвращающееся с новым смыслом.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.3: Колесо вращалось прежде. Оно будет вращаться снова. %H. Терпение — не пассивность; это признание того, что паттерн больше любого отдельного мгновения.
narr.tmpl.cycle.deep.4: %H. То, что кончается, есть и то, что начинается — цикл не знает разницы. Вот глубочайшее учение: нет истинного конца, есть лишь поворот.
narr.tmpl.festival.3: Задумайтесь: %H. Малейшее соблюдение хранит величайшую истину.
narr.tmpl.festival.4: Этот день хранили тысячу лет. %H. Хранение продолжается.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.0: Празднование пульсирует в календаре — %H. Где-то кто-то зажигает свечу, преломляет хлеб, поёт молитву, которую пели его деды. Хранение дней — это хранение памяти.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.1: Сегодня — поворотная точка. %H. Праздники — не украшения календаря, а его смысл. Без них дни были бы неразличимы.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.2: %H — календарь помнит, что важно. Каждая традиция выбирает дни, чтобы остановиться и заметить. Обычное становится священным простым актом внимания.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.3: Задумайтесь: %H. Малейшее соблюдение хранит величайшую истину. Тысяча лет хранения этого дня — и он всё ещё что-то значит. Это упорство — само по себе откровение.
narr.tmpl.festival.deep.4: Этот день хранили тысячу лет. %H. Хранение продолжается. То, что начиналось как память одной общины, стало общим наследием человечества.
narr.tmpl.number.3: Частота безошибочна — %H. %S вибрируют на одной гармонике.
narr.tmpl.number.4: %H. Числа не лгут; они обнажают то, что всегда было.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.0: Паттерн проступает в числах — %H. Вселенная считает способами, которые мы лишь начинаем постигать. Когда одно число возникает в несвязанных системах — это структура.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.1: %H. Математика времени обнажает скрытую нить. Числа — не украшения, они — скелет реальности. Сегодня этот скелет ненадолго виден.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.2: Через %S говорит общее число — %H. Разные цивилизации, разные века, разные вопросы — и та же числовая подпись.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.3: Частота безошибочна — %H. %S вибрируют на одной гармонике. Если бы можно было слышать время вместо того, чтобы видеть его, сегодня был бы аккорд.
narr.tmpl.number.deep.4: %H. Числа не лгут; они обнажают то, что всегда было. Каждая система, что считает, порой приходит к одной сумме. Сегодня — этот приход.
narr.tmpl.quiet.2: Между вехами река всё так же течёт. %H.
narr.tmpl.quiet.3: %H. Схождение не требуется. Обычного уже достаточно.
narr.tmpl.quiet.4: Системы вращаются. Ни одна не требует внимания сегодня. %H. Этого достаточно.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.0: Обычный день разворачивается. %H. Большинство дней таковы. И всё же обычный день — это место, где происходит большая часть жизни. Он заслуживает своего рода внимания.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.1: %H. Циклы продолжают свою тихую работу. Зрелищные дни получают внимание, но тихие дни несут основной груз. Семена прорастают в тишине.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.2: Между вехами река всё так же течёт. %H. Сегодня — не пункт назначения, а само путешествие. Это пространство между вехами обладает собственным богатством.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.3: %H. Схождение не требуется. Обычного уже достаточно. День, который ничего не требует, может научить больше всего.
narr.tmpl.quiet.deep.4: Системы вращаются. Ни одна не требует внимания сегодня. %H. Этого достаточно. Дар непримечательного дня — свобода просто быть.
numerology.1.brief: Number 1 — the spark of creation, the individual who walks first into the unknown
numerology.1.challenge: Isolation, selfishness, aggression, inability to cooperate
numerology.1.name: The Pioneer
numerology.1.strength: Self-reliance, courage, innovation, the ability to start from nothing
numerology.11.brief: Master 11 — the double pillar, a gateway between the mundane and the divine
numerology.11.challenge: Anxiety, nervous tension, impracticality, unrealized potential
numerology.11.name: The Illuminator
numerology.11.quality: Spiritual insight, inspiration, visionary leadership, heightened intuition
numerology.11.strength: Channel for higher wisdom, catalytic presence, inspiring others
numerology.2.brief: Number 2 — the bridge between opposites, harmony through understanding
numerology.2.name: The Peacemaker
numerology.2.strength: Empathy, patience, mediation, the gift of seeing both sides
numerology.22.brief: Master 22 — the architect of the impossible, vision grounded in brick and mortar
numerology.22.challenge: Overwhelm, self-doubt, giving up on the dream, settling for 4
numerology.22.name: The Master Builder
numerology.22.quality: Turning vision into reality, large-scale manifestation, practical idealism
numerology.22.strength: Ability to build lasting institutions, global vision with practical skill
numerology.3.brief: Number 3 — the child of 1 and 2, joy made manifest through creative expression
numerology.3.challenge: Scattered energy, superficiality, gossip, emotional avoidance through humor
numerology.3.name: The Creator
numerology.3.strength: Artistic talent, optimism, charm, the ability to inspire
numerology.33.brief: Master 33 — the Christ number, love so vast it transforms everything it touches
numerology.33.challenge: Martyrdom, self-sacrifice to the point of destruction, cosmic guilt
numerology.33.name: The Master Teacher
numerology.33.quality: Selfless service, healing through love, spiritual upliftment
numerology.33.strength: Compassion without limit, ability to heal by presence alone
numerology.4.brief: Number 4 — the four walls, the four seasons, order imposed on chaos
numerology.4.challenge: Rigidity, workaholism, narrow-mindedness, resistance to change
numerology.4.name: The Builder
numerology.4.strength: Reliability, endurance, practical skill, creating lasting foundations
numerology.5.brief: Number 5 — the five senses alive, the human who needs to taste everything
numerology.5.challenge: Restlessness, addiction, irresponsibility, fear of commitment
numerology.5.name: The Adventurer
numerology.5.strength: Adaptability, resourcefulness, magnetism, love of the new
numerology.6.brief: Number 6 — the hexagram of balance, love expressed through responsibility
numerology.6.challenge: Control, martyrdom, perfectionism, meddling in others' lives
numerology.6.name: The Nurturer
numerology.6.strength: Compassion, healing, artistic beauty, devotion to family
numerology.7.brief: Number 7 — the sacred number, the mind that questions until it touches mystery
numerology.7.name: The Seeker
numerology.7.strength: Profound thought, research ability, intuition, inner knowing
numerology.8.brief: Number 8 — the infinity loop, as above so below, material power as spiritual test
numerology.8.challenge: Greed, domination, workaholism, abuse of authority
numerology.8.name: The Powerhouse
numerology.8.strength: Business acumen, leadership, material mastery, the courage to wield power
numerology.9.brief: Number 9 — the final digit, completion that opens into new beginning
numerology.9.challenge: Martyrdom, resentment, emotional distance, difficulty receiving
numerology.9.name: The Humanitarian
numerology.9.strength: Selflessness, artistic vision, global awareness, the ability to let go
